overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character exploring a dark waterfront amusement park area at night. The character spray paints a concrete wall, walks through an overgrown area with a campfire, ascends stairs to an upper promenade, and continues along the waterfront with views of a roller coaster and Ferris wheel.

events.description: character stops walking and approaches the wall to begin spray painting
character begins spray painting the concrete wall with green paint

agents.ego_description: approaching the graffiti-covered wall and spray painting it with green paint while standing on the concrete walkway

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
large steel roller coaster framework with illuminated tracks against the dark sky
giant Ferris wheel with lit cabins visible behind the palm trees
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
calm body of water reflecting distant city lights

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a concrete waterfront walkway next to a graffiti-covered wall. In the background, a roller coaster and Ferris wheel are visible against the dark overcast sky. The character spray paints the wall with green paint while palm trees sway nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown area beneath building overpass with campfire

events.description: moving from open waterfront walkway to covered grassy area under building overpass
approaching a burning barrel that provides warm orange light in the darkness

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and vegetation under the building overpass toward the campfire

entered.detail: large concrete building overpass creating a covered area
blue neon sign reading 'LOS SANTOS' on the building facade
metal barrel with bright orange flames providing light
overgrown tall grass and weeds covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the wall into a dark, overgrown area beneath a building overpass. A neon 'LOS SANTOS' sign glows on the building above. The character approaches a burning barrel that illuminates the tall grass and weeds. The roller coaster structure remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper waterfront promenade with concrete stairs

events.description: ascending wide concrete stairs to reach the upper promenade level
emerging onto open upper promenade with reflective puddles and city views

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs and walking along the wet upper promenade with puddle reflections

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the promenade

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
elevated concrete walkway with wet reflective surface
water puddles on the ground reflecting the lights and sky

segments.scene_description: The character climbs a wide set of concrete stairs to an upper promenade level. The wet concrete surface creates puddle reflections of the surrounding lights. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction. The roller coaster and Ferris wheel are visible in the background against the dark cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway passing under concrete overpasses

events.description: passing under a concrete overpass structure that temporarily blocks the sky view

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path passing under concrete structures and alongside the water

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the water
concrete overpass creating a covered tunnel section

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the waterfront promenade, passing under concrete overpass structures. The water is visible to the left beyond the railing, while buildings and palm trees line the right side. The roller coaster remains visible in the distance as the path continues into the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark waterfront amusement park, transitioning from a graffiti-covered walkway into an overgrown underpass and finally up to an elevated promenade. It begins with the character spray painting a concrete wall in green under a cloudy night sky, with a distant roller coaster and Ferris wheel looming in the background. As the character walks away from the wall, the scene shifts into a dark, overgrown area beneath a building overpass where a glowing neon Los Santos sign and a burning barrel illuminate the surrounding tall grass. The camera then follows the character as they ascend a wide set of concrete stairs, passing a pedestrian and moving across wet surfaces that reflect the ambient city lights. Finally, the path opens onto an upper promenade where the camera glides past concrete structures and palm trees, keeping the distant amusement park rides in view while moving further into the darkness along the water's edge.
